description: Composition Light and dark grey printed sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and a zipper placket with discreet pintucks on the chest Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M Height-5.7", Chest-33"
